title: phaius ecalcaratus
intro: Phaius ecalcaratus, also known as the Yellow Formosa Orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Taiwan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Phaius ecalcaratus include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea or decoction form to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
